notes: Home-screen icon now opens the landing. The existing installed icon was baked at install time to launch dct-ios.html directly (iOS does not update an existing install's start_url from a manifest change), so it skipped the landing. dct-ios.html now carries a front-door guard: a fresh launch redirects to index.html (the landing); the landing's ENTER sets a sessionStorage flag and returns, so the app passes straight through and in-app reloads stay in the app for that session. Next fresh launch shows the landing again. No re-add of the home icon required. Three stamps aligned at v1.6.67.
